author: @moba2k
text: This is brilliant! Thank you for sharing. And you do it such big joyous spirit. Very special.

author: @jimcooper2423
text: I love the new "feel" of this video.  It reminds me of James Burke's "Connections" series from the 1970's, except Burke never concluded a "from the field history lesson" with "now let's go backl to the shop and build that".  The BBC should be contacting you about developing a programme around your "Shed" eprsodes!  Thanks for all your hard work!
